headline: Featured Work
lead: Luxury custom homes and high-end remodels throughout Southern California.

projects.title: Dana Point
projects.location: Exclusive Gated Community in Monarch Bay
projects.description: A complete coastal contemporary transformation in the heart of Dana Point, reimagining an existing residence with clean architectural lines, open concept living spaces, natural textures, and seamless indoor-outdoor connections that reflect Southern California's relaxed coastal lifestyle.

projects.title: Newport Coast
projects.description: A luxury transitional residence in Newport Coast that harmonizes timeless coastal elegance with modern sophistication. It features expansive glazing and seamless indoor-outdoor living spaces designed to complement exquisite views.
